content.problemStatement:
Write a program to obtain a number NNN and increment its value by 1 if the number is divisible by 4 otherwiseotherwiseotherwise decrement its value by 1.


Input Format
First line will contain a number NNN.



Output Format
Output a single line, the new value of the number.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains a single integer N.
content.outputFormat: Output a single line, the new value of the number.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Since 5 is not divisible by 4, its value is decreased by 1.
Since 4 is divisible by 4, its value is increased by 1.
Since 0 is divisible by 4, its value is increased by 1.

solution.approach: To solve this problem, we simply check if the input number N is divisible by 4. If it is, we increment N by 1; otherwise, we decrement N by 1.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) — the algorithm performs a constant number of operations regardless of the input size.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) — the algorithm uses a constant amount of space to store the input and output.
